summary: End-to-end verification of 3 new factions (Mechanicum Taghmata, Legio Custodes, Daemons of the Ruinstorm) + new R7 (formation-over-army-cap) rule. Backend pytest 14/14 PASS. Frontend: Landing renders exactly 25 faction cards (Coming-Soon teaser removed). All three new build flows work (Forge Army → builder → Add Formation → cost readout). R7 surfaces correctly for ordinatus-majoris (1/army), ark-mechanicus (1/army), and Solar Auxilia command-retinue (1/army). R1, R4, R6 regressions still pass. Custodes Composition Rules panel correctly states the 50% LoW cap ('up to 1/2 of points on Lords of War/Allies').

frontend_scenarios.faction_card_testids: PASS (mechanicum-taghmata, legio-custodes, daemons-ruinstorm all present & clickable)
frontend_scenarios.custodes_composition_rules_50pct_low: PASS (panel text contains 'up to 1/2 of points on Lords of War/Allies')
frontend_scenarios.R7_mech_2_ordinatus_majoris: PASS — 'Ordinatus Majoris: 2 taken — max 1 per army.'
frontend_scenarios.R7_mech_1_ordinatus_majoris_legal: PASS — no R7 issue when count==1
frontend_scenarios.R7_mech_2_ark_mechanicus: PASS — 'Ark Mechanicus: 2 taken — max 1 per army.'
frontend_scenarios.R7_solar_auxilia_2_command_retinue: PASS — 'Command Retinue: 2 taken — max 1 per army.' (new enforcement for pre-existing maxPerArmy field)
frontend_scenarios.R4_regression_sa_4_upgrades_no_crash: PASS — 'Infantry Tercio has 4 upgrades — max 3 per Line detachment.' rendered, no React crash
frontend_scenarios.R6_regression_knight_cerastus_over_cap: PASS — 'Cerastus Lance: 2 taken — max 1 allowed (1 per 2000 pts).' at 3000pts cap

critical_code_review_comments: R7 implementation in validation.js is clean and consistent with R6: Map-based counting per formationId, early-out if def.maxPerArmy unset, issue code 'formation-over-army-cap' with proper em-dash messaging. Correctly orthogonal to R6 (a Solar Auxilia command-retinue has only maxPerArmy and no maxPer, and now finally flags as over-cap when 2 are present — that was the missed enforcement called out in the review request).

Mechanicum correctly inherits Astartes defaults (no compositionLimits in payload), Custodes correctly carries lowPct:0.5, Daemons correctly carries maxSupportPerLine:1 and maxUpgradesPerLine:99 — all match the source-of-truth PDF interpretation.
Landing.jsx Coming-Soon teaser successfully removed and the Lock icon import is no longer present.

Add Formation dialog options do not carry an obvious 'formation-option-<id>' data-testid — only a per-row clickable card. Adding `data-testid="formation-option-${def.id}"` to each AddFormation card would make programmatic selection trivial for future tests (testing agents currently must fall back to text-locator).

Composition Rules panel text uses '1/2' (Custodes) vs 'max 1 per <N> pts' (R6) and 'max <N> per army' (R7) — three slightly different phrasings for caps. Consider normalising spec language for player-facing consistency, though all are individually correct.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Five TEST_-prefixed armies seeded into localStorage 'eoa.armies.v1' (a-mech2ord, a-mech1ord, a-mech2ark, a-sa2cmd, a-sa4up, a-kover); plus 3 real armies created through the build flow (TEST_Mech_Force, TEST_Custodes_Force, TEST_Daemons_Force) — all local to test browser state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 25 factions are live and validated end-to-end. R7 (formation-over-army-cap) is implemented at the tail of validateArmy() in /app/frontend/src/lib/validation.js and surfaces under [data-testid='validation-issue-formation-over-army-cap']. Message format: '<Name>: <count> taken — max <allowed> per army.' (em-dash U+2014). Knight Households faction id is 'knight-household' (singular) and the Cerastus formation id is 'cerastus-lance' (not 'cerastus-knight-lance' from review-request narrative). Add Formation dialog cards do NOT have 'formation-option-*' data-testids — use text-locator inside [data-testid='add-formation-dialog']. Forge Army dialog name input has no data-testid; use placeholder selector input[placeholder*='Reaver'].
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — all R7 enforcement and new faction payloads verified.
